items.name_en: 🎉Bonnie Oil Wax Leather🎉1BA229 Crossbody Bag🎉
items.name_cn:
🎉Bonnie Oil Wax Leather🎉1BA229 Crossbody Bag🎉
This crossbody bag is made from imported oil wax leather, with a glossy finish that exudes a classical charm. It features a detachable and adjustable long shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. It offers a very large capacity and is extremely practical 👏, making it an essential item for fashionistas. Bring this retro-style crossbody bag home now! 19.5x20x8cm🎉

items.name_en: 🎉New Bucket Bag🎉1BE085🎉🎉This stylish bucket bag reinterprets the Buckle handbag with a new silhouette, featuring imported calf leather and an imported lambskin lining. items.name_en: !!️【With full original green box packaging】!!️GG Marmont series quilted mini bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's constantly evolving aesthetic philosophy. As a highlight of the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, the leatherware is presented in a delicate light pink, a refined and elegant tone announcing the new season. On this GG Marmont series mini bag, it is presented with a dazzling touch, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Light pink V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining double G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate internal compartments, zip coin purse, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high) snap closure.
items.name_cn:

Color: New Light Pink/Factory Leather.

items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. Blue leather details create a chic and fashionable look.
items.name_cn:
!!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. Blue leather details create a chic and fashionable look.
